policy: Conflicts reported, never silently resolved. Each entry carries a recommended resolution that is NOT executed in this phase.

conflicts.summary: neg.shared.anti-generic-lock is duplicated VERBATIM in all 6 product ai-image-prompts.md files despite different product geometries.
conflicts.resolution_recommended: Each product must declare which sub-bullets apply and add product-specific negatives under neg.<product>.* component IDs. NOT performed in this phase.

conflicts.summary: schematic vs hybrid assignment per slot is documented in per-product matrices but not exposed in the orchestration manifest export contract; downstream readers cannot tell why a class was chosen.
conflicts.resolution_recommended: Add `image_class` and `class_rationale` fields to the per-slot manifest export. NOT performed in this phase.

conflicts.summary: IMG-012 is 'blocked-pending-OEM-validation' across e-orbit and e-shield matrices but no explicit status enum exists in the run-record / manifest schema.
conflicts.resolution_recommended: Add `blocked-pending-oem-validation` to the QA gate states enum (already present in this policy). Manifest exporter NOT updated in this phase.

conflicts.summary: PRODUCT_VISUAL_TRUTH.md §13 prefers compositing over generation for hero/multi-view scenarios; per-slot generation matrices do not declare `transformation_type`.
conflicts.resolution_recommended: Add `transformation_type: generate|composite` to per-slot manifest. NOT performed in this phase.

conflicts.summary: tools/comfy/workflow_api.json.json has a known double-extension filename; documented as historical artifact in COMFY_GENERATION_GOVERNANCE.md §2.
conflicts.resolution_recommended: Normalise in the workflow registry on first registry creation. NOT performed in this phase.

conflicts.summary: Compatibility PNGs at ext-images/ root (e-Flex.png, e-Nova.png, …) are 'scheduled for retirement' per multiple docs but no decommission timeline or check exists.
conflicts.resolution_recommended: Add automated check in repository_governance_audit.py classifying root-level legacy PNGs as decommission-pending. NOT performed in this phase.
